summary: Addressed disappearing chat/history issue by increasing chat transcript retention in claude-style-chat (from last 120 lines to last 5000), replacing message-count compaction with token-budget compaction in EnhancedAgent (trigger around 120k estimated tokens, target ~90k, optional second pass), and enriching compaction output with both Grounded Facts Ledger and Conversation Summary blocks so older context remains usable after optimization. Added tests for conversation summary compaction and verified via tsc + full vitest run.
current_status: Session memory behavior is now far more stable: chat line retention is larger and context compaction is token-aware with summarized carry-forward context.
